title: CommandCenterUI all-in-one: lab lifecycle + agent screens in-app
description: Operator direction: opening the UI must work like opening the wezterm lab -- an all-in-one entry point. (1) Lab lifecycle: on app open, if the lab is down (no lab agents in hcom), start it via the existing ai-command-center-lab launcher (watcher + wezterm agent tabs stay visible per lab protocol; the UI is the operator's front-end on top). Sidebar shows lab state with a manual Start button as fallback. (2) Agent screens: per-agent screen viewer in the app fed by hcom term <name> --json (read-only poll), plus a guarded inject endpoint (hcom term inject) so the operator can respond to approval prompts without switching to wezterm. Inject requires same-origin, name validated against live hcom instances, text capped. PROMO-0004 security second pass applies (inject is a new write-capable surface).
acceptance_criteria: Opening the app with the lab down brings the lab up (watcher + agents) without further operator action; lab state visible in the sidebar
Clicking an agent opens a live view of its terminal screen inside the app
Operator can send text/Enter to an agent terminal from the app to answer prompts (same-origin guarded, validated name, capped text)
hcom term reads are read-only; inject only fires on explicit operator action
